update: A second Crenshaw spot is open, it's great, and the Vodka sauce is as good as it gets.
price: $4+ for slices, $26+ for 20" pies, $33+ for squares
name: Apollonia's
headsUp: Justin is now a close friend and occasional boss, but I had the same take before the love between us blossomed.

teaser: The best NY-style slice in LA, no question. The Detroit-ish square slices are one of the few foods on Instagram that taste as good as they look.
address: 5176 Wilshire Blvd, Los Angeles, CA 90036, USA
review: This is the best New York-ish slice in LA ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ no question ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ but it can probably hang with any pizzeria in the country in terms of flawlessly executing multiple styles. Justin De Leon's thin round pies are naturally-fermented and feature the perfect ratio of crust-to-sauce-to-cheese-to-toppings. Meanwhile, the gargantuan Detroit-ish square slices are one of the few foods on Instagram that taste as good as they look.
